occurrence_sentence: [Infineon Technologies Austria, along with the University of Innsbruck, ETH Zurich and Interactive Fully Electrical Vehicles SRL from Italy, with the backing from the EU as part of the Horizon 2020 project PIEDMONS](http://vixra.org/pdf/1908.0466v1.pdf), sees the future as bright for the commercialization of quantum computers.
